description: Statistics card on a deep navy-blue textured (wood-grain-like) background. Top-left is the round U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal/eagle in white, beside three lines of white serif text: 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin red horizontal rule separates the header. Centered below in large white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with the subheading 'January 24, 2025'. The statistics are displayed in large white serif numerals: '593 Arrests' and '449 Detainers Lodged'. At the bottom in italic white serif is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. There are no photos.
notable_text: Enforcement Update January 24, 2025 | 593 Arrests | 449 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
